form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (22.63) when second at this track in a OPEN. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed four times. Looks suited and should go close.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Angle Park over 342m in 19.51 last start, beating Sebon Disco. Solid formlines coming through that last run. Looks a major player.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Angle Park over 342m in 19.51 last start, beating Sebon Disco. Solid formlines coming through that last run. Looks a major player.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked first turn; Checked turn off back straight.

form.formComment: Facing tougher opposition than he has faced recent starts and current form just not to what is required to figure. Not going well enough to consider.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Facing tougher opposition than he has faced recent starts and current form just not to what is required to figure. Not going well enough to consider.

form.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 1.5 lengths third at Angle Park but did record a slick 19.62 over the 342m journey. Warrants respect.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 1.5 lengths third at Angle Park but did record a slick 19.62 over the 342m journey. Warrants respect.

form.formComment: Recorded the fastest time on the card notching his seven straight wins at Murray Bridge over 395m (22.19). With even luck looks hard to beat again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Recorded the fastest time on the card notching his seven straight wins at Murray Bridge over 395m (22.19). With even luck looks hard to beat again.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 0.8 lengths over 400m at this track in a handy (22.54), beating Roll On Coaster. Will find this a bit tougher, be tough to make an impression against this lot.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 0.8 lengths over 400m at this track in a handy (22.54), beating Roll On Coaster. Will find this a bit tougher, be tough to make an impression against this lot.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide and stumbled home straight.

form.formComment: Scored by 6 lengths last time (22.21) in a OPEN over 400m at this track. Has performed well off the draw with a win and four places from eight starts. Looks a place chance at best.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (22.74) in a OPEN, finishing a 7 length fourth. Goes very well from the draw boasting three places from five starts. Can feature in the finish.

form.formComment: Country racer who only starts fairly, coming off mixed results. Was 5th last start over 375m at Broken Hill (22.14) beaten 5 lengths, behind Edgy Girl in NG on March 27. This will test.
